top_signals.title: US-Japan More Aligned on FX, Katayama Says After Bessent Talks
top_signals.summary: Japan’s Finance Minister Satsuki Katayama said she had talks over phone with US Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent, a move that only gave the yen a short-lived boost as it hovers near the weakest level in four decades.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Speed or stability? Bond markets strap in for Andy Burnham coronation
top_signals.summary: City bond traders are strapping in for a “jumpy” ride as Andy Burnham looks set to cruise into Downing Street uncontested – even if a coronation helps head off the worst volatility, analysts have said. The former Manchester Mayor’s bid for the top job won a major boost today as former health secretary Wes Streeting [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.

top_signals.title: Why Google, Tesla and AMD are turning to Samsung for AI chips
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
